### What problem are you trying to solve?

<!--
Describe the workflow you want to automate or the thing you currently can't
do. Focus on the use case, not the implementation — "I want to list every
Jira filter I own" is more useful than "add `atl jira filter list`".
-->

### Proposed command or behaviour

<!--
If you have a concrete shape in mind, sketch it here. Otherwise leave blank
and we can design it together.

Example:
    atl jira filter list [--owner currentUser()] [--limit <n>]
    atl jira filter view <id>
-->

```
```

### Atlassian API reference

<!--
Link to the REST endpoint(s) this would wrap, if you know them. Helpful even
for rough proposals.

Examples:
- https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/rest/v2/api-group-filters/
- Data Center: /rest/api/2/filter
-->

### Alternatives considered

<!--
Have you worked around this with `atl api`, a shell script, or another tool?
